property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\Jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Player\bin\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Windows\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Muse Hub\lib;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\emulator;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\PyManager\;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Muse Hub\lib;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\aksha\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Nmap;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.5\bin;C:\Program Files\PyManager\python.exe;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login Page", "Validate login Functionality."](1)

failure.message:
class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

testcase.failure:
io.cucumber.core.exception.CucumberException: class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

Scenario Outline: Login Page # src/test/java/Features/Login.feature:14 âœ” Given User opens the Browser. # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.user_opens_the_browser() âœ” And Navigate to the given URL. # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.navigate_to_the_given_url() âœ” When User Enters "Admin" and "admin123" # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.user_enters_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) âœ” And Click on the login button. # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.click_on_the_login_button() ==========Login page open=========== Page Title is=OrangeHRM âœ” Then Validate the LoginPage Title "OrangeHRM" # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.validate_the_login_page_title(java.lang.String) io.cucumber.core.exception.CucumberException: class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

May 04, 2026 3:28:57 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 May 04, 2026 3:28:57 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.38.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login Page", "Validate login Functionality."](2)

failure.message:
class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

testcase.name: runScenario["Login Page", "Validate login Functionality."](3)

failure.message:
class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

Scenario Outline: Login Page # src/test/java/Features/Login.feature:16 âœ” Given User opens the Browser. # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.user_opens_the_browser() âœ” And Navigate to the given URL. # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.navigate_to_the_given_url() âœ” When User Enters "Admin" and "admin123" # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.user_enters_credentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) âœ” And Click on the login button. # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.click_on_the_login_button() ==========Login page open=========== Page Title is=OrangeHRM âœ” Then Validate the LoginPage Title "OrangeHRM" # stepDefinitions.loginSteps.validate_the_login_page_title(java.lang.String) io.cucumber.core.exception.CucumberException: class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.38.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Login Page", "Validate login Functionality."](4)

failure.message:
class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

testcase.system-err: May 04, 2026 3:30:02 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 May 04, 2026 3:30:02 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.38.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
